ProximityOps.title: Rendezvous and Proximity Operations (RPO)
ProximityOps.helpBody: Find upcoming close approaches between satellites. Configure search parameters including distance threshold, relative velocity, and orbit type (GEO/LEO). Supports single-satellite and all-vs-all search modes.
ProximityOps.geoAllVsAllTooltip: Search for RPOs between all geostationary satellites
ProximityOps.comparePayloadsOnlyTooltip: Only search for RPOs between payloads
ProximityOps.ignoreVimpelRsoTooltip: Ignore RSOs sourced from Vimpel Catalog
ProximityOps.satNotFound: Satellite with NORAD ID {sccNum} not found
